chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-627 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.5846/2025 03-11-2025 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Shahadat Ali Laghari Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, same is taken on record. Applicant Mst. Allah Dini has invoked the inherit jurisdiction of this court, calling in question order dated 27.09.2025, passed by the court of learned Judicial Magistrate-II, Mirwah, whereby report u/s 173 Cr.P.C submitted by the I.O., in crime No.225/2025, u/s 506/2, 147, 148 and 149 PPC is accepted for disposal of the case under false ‘B’ class. Heard arguments of learned counsel for the respective parties and perused the record. After arguments, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he will not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application, if the disposal of the case under ’B’ class may be treated as ‘C’ class mainly on the pretext that the applicant was an old lady. Learned counsel for respondent No.5 submits that prior to this, a case bearing Crime No.129/2025, u/s 506/ PPC, was registered against the accused as of the instant case and after full-fledged trial,, the accused was acquitted by the court of learned Judicial Magistrate Mirwah on 27.09.2025, and in order to put pressure upon the respondents No.4 to 8, the instant case was registered, which after usual investigation was opined to be disposed of under ‘B’ class, which was approved by the learned Magistrate through the order impugned herein.

After arguments, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he will not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application, if the disposal of the case under ’B’ class may be treated as ‘C’ class mainly on the pretext that the applicant was an old lady. Learned counsel for respondent No.5 submits that prior to this, a case bearing Crime No.129/2025, u/s 506/ PPC, was registered against the accused as of the instant case and after full-fledged trial,, the accused was acquitted by the court of learned Judicial Magistrate Mirwah on 27.09.2025, and in order to put pressure upon the respondents No.4 to 8, the instant case was registered, which after usual investigation was opined to be disposed of under ‘B’ class, which was approved by the learned Magistrate through the order impugned herein. However, he concedes that the shall have no objection, if the instant criminal miscellaneous application is allowed and the case registered by the application be disposed of under ‘C’ class. Learned DPG has also extended his consent to that effect. Accordingly, the impugned order is converted to the extent of its disposal under ‘C’ class instead of ‘B’ class with direction to the applicant to remain careful in future and avoid to registered the cases of like nature, which may expose her for penal action in accordance with law. JUDGE SulemenKhan/PA
